content: Remote OK Expression of Interest Easygo <strong>Join the Easygo Talent Community<br><br></strong>Can't find the right role? As Director of Hiring and Training you will be responsible for the following:<br><br>- Gatekeeper of 7Brew, hand selecting everyone who joins the 7Crew Family<br>- Hire 60-75 new brewistas for each new stand opening<br>- Work with HR to onboard all these individualsÂ <br>- Assist within your region to backfill existing stands<br>- Train 60-75 new brewistas for the New Stand Development Team<br>- Assist with Baller Manager to ensure training within the openings is consistent and correct at all times.<br>- Build processes within our training team to ensure quality and consistency for our team<br>- Build a welcoming environment for our newest members to learn and flourish<br><br>Â education, hr, exec Tampa, Tampa, Florida, United States 2026-07-06T06:00:00+00:00 1134543 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-head-of-hiring-and-training-south-fl-7-brew-coffee-1134543 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Human Resources Generalist Manager Seasoned Recruitment <strong>About The Opportunity<br><br></strong>Our organization is looking for a dynamic HR Manager to lead our people operations during an exciting phase of growth. As a hands-on generalist, you will own the full employee lifecycle end-to-end, partnering with leadership to build scalable processes and a premier staff experience.<br><br><strong>Key Qualifications<br><br></strong><ul><li>3-5 years of HR experience, with at least 2 years as a generalist owning multiple functions</li><li>Required: Strong working knowledge of California and Arizona state employment laws</li><li>Desired: Proficiency in Rippling HRIS</li><li>Desired: High growth, or start-up experience</li><li>Required: Availability for full-time work within Pacific Time Zone business hours</li><li>Experience in healthcare or regulated industries is highly preferred</li><li>Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience; HR certification (PHR/SHRM-CP) is a plus</li><li>Exceptional communication skills and discretion with confidential information<br><br></li></ul>Core Responsibilities<br><br><ul><li>Compliance &amp; Payroll: Manage multi-state compliance, own full-cycle payroll in Rippling, and maintain audit-ready records</li><li>Talent Acquisition: Drive full-cycle recruiting from JD creation to onboarding top-tier talent</li><li>Employee Experience: Administer benefits, design engagement programs, and support professional development</li><li>Strategic Partnership: Serve as the primary HR resource for managers, providing coaching on performance and policy<br><br></li></ul><strong>Compensation &amp; Benefits<br><br></strong>We offer a competitive salary of $65,000 - $75,000 plus a comprehensive benefits package including health plans, 401(k), generous PTO, and a remote-first work environment.<br><br>How to Apply<br><br>Ready to make an impact?
